channel.title: Dashboard on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Dashboard on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Kubernetes Dashboard vs Headlamp vs K9s: Best Cluster Management Tools 2026
item.description: Managing kubernetes clusters through kubectl alone becomes exhausting as the number of workloads, namespaces, and services grows. You need visibility into pod health, log aggregation, resource consumption, and the ability to quickly restart failing deployments — all without typing long command strings.

item.title: Portainer vs Dockge vs Yacht: Best Container Management Dashboard 2026
item.description: Managing containers through the command line works fine for a handful of services. But once you are running a dozen containers across multiple hosts — databases, reverse proxies, monitoring stacks, media servers — clicking around a terminal gets exhausting fast.
